design_philosophy: A highly functional, 'Control Room' environment designed for precision data extraction. The aesthetic blends Swiss Brutalism with modern SaaS utility. The UI feels like a digital processing plant: sharp, clear, and unopinionated, allowing the data (CSV) to take center stage. We use stark contrasts, strict grid systems, and mono-spaced fonts for data to convey absolute authority and clarity.

fonts.instructions_to_agent: Ensure fonts are imported via Google Fonts or Fontshare in the main index.css or layout.

rules: Tinted Grey Rule: Greys should have a very subtle cool/blue tint to feel intentional, not muddy.
Primary color (International Klein Blue #002FA7) is reserved ONLY for primary actions (Upload, Transcrire, Download).
No gradients. Color is function only.

page_layout.sidebar: col-span-1 border-r border-[#E5E7EB] bg-white h-full overflow-y-auto
page_layout.main_content: col-span-1 md:col-span-3 p-8 flex flex-col gap-8 h-full overflow-y-auto

spacing_and_layout.surface_strategy: Grid Borders (The 'Technical' Look). Use sharp edges, minimal border-radius (rounded-none or max rounded-sm). Emphasize structural 1px borders.

buttons.outline: border border-[#E5E7EB] bg-white text-[#111110] hover:border-[#111110] hover:bg-gray-50

file_upload_zone.layout: w-full border-2 border-dashed border-[#E5E7EB] hover:border-[#002FA7] hover:bg-blue-50/30 transition-colors duration-300 p-12 flex flex-col items-center justify-center gap-4 bg-white rounded-sm cursor-pointer relative group
file_upload_zone.text_content_fr: Glissez-déposez votre document ici ou cliquez pour parcourir. (Formats: JPG, PNG, PDF)

data_table_csv.wrapper: w-full overflow-x-auto border border-[#E5E7EB] bg-white rounded-sm shadow-sm
data_table_csv.th: bg-[#F9F9F8] border-b border-[#E5E7EB] p-3 text-xs uppercase tracking-[0.1em] text-[#4B5563] font-semibold sticky top-0
data_table_csv.input_inline: w-full h-full p-3 font-mono text-sm text-[#111110] bg-transparent border-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#002FA7] focus:outline-none
data_table_csv.note: The last cell in a row should not have a right border.

model_selector.style: flex items-center gap-4 p-4 border border-[#E5E7EB] bg-white rounded-sm
model_selector.implementation: Use shadcn/ui Select or ToggleGroup component, customized to have sharp edges and high-contrast active states.

history_sidebar.item: p-4 border-b border-[#E5E7EB] hover:bg-[#F9F9F8] cursor-pointer transition-colors flex flex-col gap-1

motion.hover_states: Crisp and immediate. Buttons drop a subtle shadow or slightly darken background. Borders snap to focus color.
motion.upload_zone: Use a subtle 'Tracing Beam' or outline highlight effect when a file is dragged over. No bouncy animations.

image_urls.description: Abstract minimalist 3D composition of floating physical paper sheets magically converting into a structured digital grid. Use this in the main content area when no file is uploaded or selected, above or near the upload zone, to add visual polish.

icons.instructions: Use lucide-react for all UI icons (Upload, Download, History, FileText, Settings, ChevronRight). Keep stroke width at 1.5 or 2 for a crisp, technical look.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly apply the French language for all UI elements ('Historique', 'Transcrire', 'Télécharger CSV', etc.).
Do NOT use 'Inter' font. Use 'Cabinet Grotesk' for headings, 'IBM Plex Sans' for UI, and 'IBM Plex Mono' strictly for the CSV data table content.
Implement the 'Control Room' grid layout: A persistent left sidebar for History (25% width on desktop) and the main operational zone on the right (75% width).
Make the CSV Data Table fully editable inline. Use standard HTML inputs inside table cells, stripped of default borders, that fill the cell and show a sharp 2px #002FA7 focus ring on click.
Ensure the hero/empty state image provided in media.image_urls is displayed elegantly when the user has not yet uploaded a document.
Do not use generic Shadcn soft-rounded cards. Override Shadcn border-radius to 'rounded-sm' or 'rounded-none' for a technical, brutalist feel.
Ensure all buttons have explicit hover text colors to guarantee APCA contrast compliance.
